item.title: This Massive Fandom is Screaming About a Major Reveal
item.description: Sarah J. Maas reveals the release dates for the next ACOTAR books, the trailer for THE HANDMAID'S TALE sequel series, and more.

item.title: A New Dystopian Novel from the Author of The Giver—and More SFF Links
item.description: In today's round-up of recent sci-fi and fantasy links, a new Lois Lowry, recent SFF awards and honors, and more!

item.title: The Bestselling Books of the Week, According to All the Lists
item.description: USA Today, Publishers Weekly, NYT, Amazon, and Indie Booksellers all have their own bestseller lists. Here are the combined results.

item.description: Add these new Latine books to your reading lists this spring, from a debut rom-com set in Venezuela and and a gothic thriller to a romantic YA ghost s...
